```{r}
#| label: fig-bw
#| fig-cap: !expr 'paste(sR$`fig-cap`[[1]]$`fig-bw`, sprintf(sR$`fig-cap`[[2]]$`no-bnch`, sprintf("%i%s%s", 50L, sR$unit_separator, sR$gramm_abbreviation)), sprintf(sR$`fig-cap`[[3]]$`no-bnch`, sprintf("%i%s", 25L, sR$percent_symbol), sprintf("%i%s", 50L, sR$percent_symbol), sprintf("%i%s", 75L, sR$percent_symbol)))'

bw_scale_min <- reference_data$birth_weight_figure$scale$min
bw_scale_max <- reference_data$birth_weight_figure$scale$max
histogram_data <- reference_data$birth_weight_figure$frequency
density_data <- reference_data$birth_weight_figure$density

density_factor <- sum(histogram_data$n) *
  (nrow(density_data) / length(seq.int(from = min(density_data$birth_weight), to = max(density_data$birth_weight), by = 50L)))

A_plot <- ggplot() +
  geom_col(
    data = histogram_data,
    aes(
      x = birth_weight_cat,
      y = n),
    fill = "white",
    colour = NeoIPC_pallette[6]) +
  geom_line(
    data = density_data,
    aes(
      x = birth_weight,
      y = density * density_factor)) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = breaks_bw) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = rev(pal[2:3])) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(bw_scale_min, bw_scale_max)) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    plot.tag = element_text(size = 9),
    axis.title = element_blank(),
    axis.text = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor.y = element_blank()) +
  labs(tag = "A")

B_plot <- ggplot(
  reference_data$birth_weight_figure$location_parameters |>
    dplyr::bind_cols(x = 1),
  aes(x)) +
  geom_boxplot(
    aes(ymin = q1, lower = q1, middle = q2, upper = q3, ymax = q3),
    stat = "identity",
    outlier.shape = NA
    ) +
  geom_point(aes(y = mean), shape = 23, size = 3, fill = "white") +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = breaks_bw, labels = labels_bw) +
  coord_flip(ylim = c(bw_scale_min, bw_scale_max)) +
  theme(
    legend.title = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "none",
    plot.tag = element_text(size = 9),
    axis.title = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, vjust = 1),
    axis.text.y = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor.y = element_blank()) +
  labs(tag = "B")

A_plot / B_plot
```
